counters.description: if she knows how to play there will be a 100 minion gap by the end of the game to her advantage, play around your support, farm and stay even in cs and rush vampiric scepter asap
don't know how to beat this yet
if she autoattacks you and she has a heavy cc support you will die
outranges you, pokes you, try to get lead early-on and trade with him in lane lowering his hp, do not let him poke you down or you will lose.
outranges you, play around his w cooldown, bait it, then go to work on him.

control/zone her in lane, if she all-ins you, you are going to die, so aa her behind your minions and lower her hp and control her in lane or she will kill you and gain incredible level advantage thanks to her xp bonus on q!

play safe, play around your support, if he e's you, you cannot escape, all you have to do is fight to the death with him if you are going down. manage wave, freeze and let your support work the lane. if you are going to win a duel against him, you must run exhaust and land a condemn-stun on him. otherwise you are toast.
he's super strong atm so it's pretty even but burst-wise he wins every trade early-on during laning-phase, tumble his q, bait his e, and you win. after laning phase you can dominate him easily.

if she all-ins you, you are probably going to die, you must try to dominate lane between lvl 1-2 and aa her everytime she tries to cs, you also need heavy cc support to stop her combo. your hp pool is the lowest in the game meaning she can easily 100-0 you

outranges you, can easily cc you with her feathers, be vary of her ult flash+combo and try to mimic and counter it. if you can do this, you can win, otherwise you are pretty much relying on your support because of the range disadvantage in lane. do not run towards her in a straight line, she will root you and kill you.
has more range than you, annoying to lane against, not neccessarily stronger than you, but will outpush, outrange and outdamage you early-game.

synergies.description: most broken support with vayne, incredible duo. can nullify every match-up there is if played correctly.
godlike support, incredible if played well!
disgusting combo, she will weigh up your weak laning phase and allow you to farm and come into the game on your terms, amazing pick.
my man bard
your laning becomes 300 times easier
very strong
yes, yes, yes!
absolutely
amazing w/ vayne
heals you, speeds you, lowers enemy dmg on you, stunlocks enemies, can harass enemies, amazing pick with vayne.
speeds you, resurrects you, makes you gain levels faster, harasses for you, great with vayne
heals you, gives you extra ad range+has a cleanse, amazing pick
